# coolify_hetzner_server_types (Data Source)

Lists all available Hetzner server types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_hetzner_server_types" "all" {}

output "hetzner_server_type_names" {
  value = [for st in data.coolify_hetzner_server_types.all.server_types : st.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `server_types` (Attributes List) The list of Hetzner server types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--server_types))

<a id="nestedatt--server_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `server_types`

Read-Only:

- `cores` (Number) The number of CPU cores.
- `description` (String) The description of the server type.
- `disk` (Number) The disk size in GB.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the server type.
- `memory` (Number) The amount of memory in MB.
- `name` (String) The name of the server type.
